title: How dry times and spare parts led this sheep farmer to a champion invention
description_clean: The competition is all about highlighting farmers' problem-solving devices.
summary: A sheep farmer's invention, developed in response to dry conditions and using spare parts, won recognition in a competition highlighting farmers' problem-solving devices.

title: Country Life: Lessons from land in John Connell's The Wisdom of Farmers
description_clean: The whole world can take lessons from farmers, Irish farmer and the author says.
summary: Irish farmer and author John Connell discusses his book The Wisdom of Farmers, arguing that the world can learn lessons from farmers.

title: Country Life: Timorese lend hand in NZ orchards
description_clean: Thousands of Timorese applied to join New Zealand's seasonal worker scheme, which opened to Timor-Leste for the first time this year.
summary: Thousands of Timorese applied to join New Zealand's seasonal worker scheme, which opened to Timor-Leste for the first time this year, with workers helping in NZ orchards.

title: From farm to skin: Cloudy Peaks adds value beyond the beef
description_clean: Cloudy Peaks Station has turned beef tallow into a premium skincare range, creating a traceable business that makes more from every animal. The post From farm to skin: Cloudy Peaks adds value beyond the beef appeared first on Farmers Weekly .
summary: Cloudy Peaks Station has developed a premium skincare range made from beef tallow, creating a traceable business that adds value to each animal.

title: Boekeman Machinery to host a potentially final grain automate workshop
description_clean: New autonomous farming tech to be showcased on the day.
summary: Boekeman Machinery is hosting a grain automate workshop, potentially its final one, to showcase new autonomous farming technology.

title: Rising returns put farmers back in the black with banks
description_clean: A Federated Farmers Banking Survey and Reserve Bank data show strong meat and milk returns are helping farmers reduce debt and improve banking relationships. The post Rising returns put farmers back in the black with banks appeared first on Farmers Weekly .
summary: A Federated Farmers Banking Survey and Reserve Bank data indicate that strong meat and milk returns are helping farmers reduce debt and improve their banking relationships.

title: Magnificent 1295 acre Carrs Creek delivers quality rural lifestyle | Video
description_clean: Stunning frontage to the Mammy Johnsons River.
summary: A 1295-acre rural property called Carrs Creek, featuring frontage to the Mammy Johnsons River, is presented as a quality rural lifestyle offering.

title: New England Angus producers learn valuable lessons from previous drought
description_clean: Merriwa's Rodgers family is off-loading due to dry conditions.
summary: The Rodgers family of Merriwa, New England Angus producers, are off-loading stock due to dry conditions, drawing on lessons from previous drought.

title: Victorian duo's 'unreal' victory in the National Merino Pairs arena
description_clean: Two studs have been crowned national champions.
summary: Two Victorian studs were crowned national champions in the National Merino Pairs competition.
